heading: Reports
label: 1010 Reports

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: On or before , and on or before November 30 of each year thereafter, the Attorney General shall submit to Congress and make available to the public a report on the amounts paid during the preceding fiscal year to telecommunications carriers under sections 1003(e) and 1008 of this title.November 30, 1995

children.label: A
children.text: a detailed accounting of the amounts paid to each carrier and the equipment, facility, or service for which the amounts were paid; and

children.label: B
children.text: projections of the amounts expected to be paid in the current fiscal year, the carriers to which payment is expected to be made, and the equipment, facilities, or services for which payment is expected to be made.

children.heading: Reports by Comptroller General and Inspector General
children.label: b Reports by Comptroller General and Inspector General
A
children.text: describing the type of equipment, facilities, and services that have been brought into compliance under this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: reflecting its analysis of the reasonableness and cost-effectiveness of the payments made by the Attorney General to telecommunications carriers for modifications necessary to ensure compliance with this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Compliance cost estimates
children.label: 2 .—Compliance cost estimates
children.text: A report under paragraph (1) shall include findings and conclusions on the costs to be incurred by telecommunications carriers to comply with the assistance capability requirements of after the effective date of such , including projections of the amounts expected to be incurred and a description of the equipment, facilities, or services for which they are expected to be incurred.section 1002 of this titlesection 1002 of this title
